coupon.source_phrase_block:
191W Atlantic Ave, Boston, MA, 02110
                                                            
    Map
617-223-8666
Half-priced ferry tickets to the Boston Harbor Islands national park areas for up to 4 people. After booking this library pass, follow the instructions in your confirmation email to book a ferry reservation. The code can be used to purchase discounted tickets to Spectacle Island, Georges Island and Peddocks Island.
Please refer to the Ferry Schedule at: https://bostonharborislands.org/ferryschedule
For all activities visit Resources at https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1D_JeZy1VwWfKJOH48jvKlslF806UEraY
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
